16.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library in C11; many compilers no longer support it, leading to compilation errors. Use 'fgets' instead.]

21.reason: [Accessing s[i-1] when i=0 or s[i+1] when i is the last index leads to undefined behavior (reading outside array bounds). The code does not check if i>0 and s[i+1] is not '\0'.]
